items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to merge decision workflow with survivor/merged ids. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or records related to this specific requirement, leading to an inconclusive result. The absence of relevant evidence means that it cannot be determined whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
